pinnedComment: Earning more without fixing habits just means losing more, faster. Track everything for 7 days — you'll find at least 3 things you forgot you were paying for.
Earning more without fixing habits just means losing more, faster. Track everything for 7 days — you'll find at least 3 things you forgot you were paying for.
The formula is: earn → invest first → live on the rest. Not earn → spend → invest whatever's left. That ordering is everything.
Wealth = the gap between what you earn and what you spend. Every raise widens that gap — unless you upgrade your lifestyle to close it again. Choose wisely.

DCA = buy a fixed amount every single month, no matter what the market is doing. You win when prices drop (you buy more units) and you win when it rises (your units gain value). Simple. Boring. It works.
They taught us to survive in an economy that no longer exists. The rules changed. Job security is gone, pensions are rare, one income isn't enough. Unlearning is the first step.
Affiliate marketing = recommend products you already believe in, earn a commission when someone buys through your link. No product. No inventory. No customer service. Just content and consistency.
